Parse ESPN MBB Player Box, helper function

Source: R/espn_mbb_data.R
helper_espn_mbb_player_box.Rd

Parse ESPN MBB Player Box, helper function

Usage

helper_espn_mbb_player_box(resp)

Arguments

resp

Response object from the ESPN MBB game summary endpoint

Value

Returns a tibble
